mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO daily_inspection_table
table_code, table_name, production_line_id, shift_mode, Implementer, status, creator_id, created_at, updated_at,
#{tableCode}, #{tableName}, #{productionLineId}, #{shiftMode}, #{implementer}, #{status}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt},
mapper.select:
SELECT dit.id, dit.table_code, dit.table_name, dit.production_line_id, dit.shift_mode, dit.Implementer, dit.status, dit.creator_id, dit.created_at AS createdAt, dit.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM daily_inspection_table dit WHERE dit.id = #{id}
AND dit.creator_id = #{creatorId}

SELECT dit.id, dit.table_code, dit.table_name, dit.production_line_id, dit.shift_mode, dit.Implementer, dit.status, dit.creator_id, dit.created_at AS createdAt, dit.updated_at AS updatedAt, pl.line_name AS productionLineName, su.real_name AS creatorName, su.username AS creatorUsername FROM daily_inspection_table dit LEFT JOIN production_line pl ON dit.production_line_id = pl.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON dit.creator_id = su.id
AND dit.creator_id = #{creatorId}
AND pl.line_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productionLineName}, '%')
AND dit.table_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tableName}, '%')
AND dit.table_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tableCode}, '%')
AND dit.shift_mode = #{shiftMode}
ORDER BY dit.id DESC
SELECT table_code FROM daily_inspection_table WHERE creator_id = #{creatorId} AND table_code LIKE '%XJ%' ORDER BY table_code DESC LIMIT 1
